creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Nov  9 21:46:37 2013
New Revision: 333343
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333343

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, add WWW
  
  PR:		ports/183698
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:46:31 2013	(r333342)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:46:37 2013	(r333343)
@@ -8,9 +8,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	x11-toolkits perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	http://asofyet.org/muppet/software/gtk2-perl/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module for gtkhtml2 html display widget with Gtk2-Perl
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-ExtUtils-Depends>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-Depends \
 		p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-PkgConfig \
 		p5-Glib2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Glib2 \
@@ -24,9 +26,4 @@ USES=		pkgconfig perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-install:
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/blib/man3 && ${FIND} * -name "*.3" | ${SED} \
-		's,^,${MAN3PREFIX:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}/man/man3/,' >> ${TMPPLIST}
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-descr	Sat Nov  9 21:46:31 2013	(r333342)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-descr	Sat Nov  9 21:46:37 2013	(r333343)
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 The Gtk2::Html2 extension allows a perl developer to use the gtkhtml2 html
 display widget with Gtk2-Perl.
+
+WWW: https://git.gnome.org/browse/perl-Gtk2-Html2/

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-plist	Sat Nov  9 21:46:31 2013	(r333342)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/p5-Gtk2-Html2/pkg-plist	Sat Nov  9 21:46:37 2013	(r333343)
@@ -1,16 +1,21 @@
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/.packlist
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/Html2.so
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/Html2.bs
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Context.pod
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Document.pod
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install/Files.pm
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install/gtkhtml2perl.typemap
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install/gtkhtml2perl-autogen.h
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install/gtkhtml2perl.h
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2.pm
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Context.pod
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/View.pod
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install/gtkhtml2perl.typemap
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Stream.pod
-%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Document.pod
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/View.pod
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/index.pod
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/.packlist
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/Html2.bs
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2/Html2.so
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Gtk2::Html2::Context.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Gtk2::Html2::Document.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Gtk2::Html2::Stream.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Gtk2::Html2::View.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/Gtk2::Html2::index.3.gz
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Gtk2/Html2
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2/Install
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/Gtk2/Html2
